caption: A man with a grey, tall, textured hairstyle sits in a room and speaks into a black professional microphone. He wears black headphones, clear-framed glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. The background features a white wall with a framed picture of a yellow shield emblem and a blurred poster of a man's face. To the left, a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". On-screen logos appearing in the bottom corners of the frames include "#REALTALK PODCAST" on the left and "REAL TALK 101" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression remains focused as he speaks; he briefly lifts his hand in a gesturing motion before returning it to a resting position. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up in a medium shot.
